answer:
To find the tens digit of $13^{2023}$, we can use the fact that the last two digits of $13^n$ repeat in a cycle of length 20.

The last two digits of $13^1$ are 13, $13^2$ are 69, $13^3$ are 67, $13^4$ are 61, $13^5$ are 73, $13^6$ are 19, $13^7$ are 57, $13^8$ are 01, $13^9$ are 13, $13^{10}$ are 69, $13^{11}$ are 87, $13^{12}$ are 61, $13^{13}$ are 73, $13^{14}$ are 79, $13^{15}$ are 37, $13^{16}$ are 61, $13^{17}$ are 13, $13^{18}$ are 69, $13^{19}$ are 87, $13^{20}$ are 61.

We can see that the last two digits of $13^n$ repeat in a cycle of length 20. Since $2023 \equiv 3 \pmod{20}$, we have that the last two digits of $13^{2023}$ are the same as the last two digits of $13^3$, which are 67.

Therefore, the tens digit of $13^{2023}$ is 6.

\boxed{6}
